message:
chore(tokenizer): Remove orphaned duplicate files

Removed 16 orphaned files from packages/tokenizer/src/ that duplicated
functionality from the main runtime package:

Orphaned Python type wrappers (10 files):
- runtime.zig - duplicated packages/runtime/src/runtime.zig
- http.zig - duplicated Lib/http.zig (also had broken imports)
- dict.zig, pybool.zig, pyfloat.zig, pyint.zig, pylist.zig,
  pystring.zig, python.zig, pytuple.zig - duplicated Objects/*.zig

Orphaned bench files with broken imports (5 files):
- bench_chunks.zig, bench_encoding_only.zig, bench_native.zig,
  bench_profile_detailed.zig, bench_with_counts.zig
- These imported from non-existent paths (runtime/src/json/)

Orphaned subdirectory:
- runtime/builtins.zig

These files were never imported by the main tokenizer.zig entry point
and formed an isolated cluster of dead code from an earlier architecture.
